# technitium_tsig_key (Resource)

Manages a TSIG key on a Technitium DNS Server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "technitium_tsig_key" "transfer" {
  key_name  = "xfer-key.example.com"
  algorithm = "hmac-sha256"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `algorithm` (String) HMAC algorithm for the TSIG key.
- `key_name` (String) DNS name identifying the TSIG key.

### Optional

- `shared_secret` (String, Sensitive) Base64-encoded shared secret. If omitted, the server generates one.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier for the TSIG key. Same as key_name.
